rationale: Both reviews identify the identical scope violations in the diff (bundled AffineAlgGroup at l34/35, naive IsUnipotent at l48/49, and True-stub Reductive/Semisimple classes at l60/65 before any Layers 0-5 prerequisites), so acting on either produces the same outcome of removal or deferral; no review-unique findings exist that are real, material, and actionable for scope.
